Controlling Claude Code from my phone is next-level coding p0-rn.

I don't want to hear your "oPeNcLaW dOeS tHat" crap. I don't care. https://t.co/ZBL5aVA5Pp

It's extremely valuable not to be influenced by fashion. In just about everything people do, from choosing problems to work on to buying art, there are unfashionable options that are not only better than the fashionable ones, but cheaper too, because they're unfashionable.
I just got a serious email asking if I'd like to book a trip to the moon. Mostly the future hasn't turned out like I expected when I was a kid in the 1970s, but this is exactly what I expected.

Now before I reply to someone I have to check first that I'm not being baited by an account that spams everyone with AI-generated replies.

Can you write some software to do this check for me @nikitabier?
